qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Describe the relational algebraic expression giving the relation returned by the following SQL query. Select SNAME from S Where SNOin (select SNO from SP where PNOin (select PNO from P Where COLOUR='BLUE'))

qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Select SNAME from S Where SNOin (select SNO from SP where PNOin (select PNO from P Where COLOUR='BLUE')) What relations are being used in the above SQL query? Given at least two attributes of each of these relations.

qids.subject: Databases
